title: 信息日报 2026-07-13

headline.title: 伊朗战争实时：德黑兰攻击巴林、科威特、约旦，此前美国轰炸
headline.summary: 伊朗官方媒体报道，在美军再次轰炸伊朗城市后，伊朗袭击了巴林、科威特和约旦，霍尔木兹海峡紧张局势加剧，全球市场应声下跌。
headline.title_en: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan after US bombings
headline.summary_en: Iranian state media report explosions in port cities of Bandar Abbas, Sirik and Jask, as well as Qeshm Island, after US bombings, leading to attacks on Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan.
headline.original_title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan after US bombings
headline.reason: 伊朗攻击多国导致中东战争升级，直接冲击全球金融市场和能源供应，是最重要的国际新闻。
headline.reason_en: Iran's attacks on multiple countries escalate the Middle East war, directly impacting global financial markets and energy supply, making it the most important international news.
